metadata.title: Donanemab Physiologically Based Pharmacokinetic Model Coupled With Natural Life Cycle Model for Amyloid Plaque Aggregation to Predict Target CSF and ISF Concentrations Associated With Amyloid Plaque Reduction
metadata.study: Pharmacokinetic modeling of donanemab across studies
metadata.source_file: [2025-Q3] Donanemab 生理药代动力学模型与淀粉样斑块聚集的自然生命周期模型相结合，预测与淀粉样斑块减少相关的目标脑脊液 (CSF) 和脑间质液 (ISF) 浓度.md

modeling_approach.amyloid_model: Natural life cycle model of amyloid aggregation
modeling_approach.endpoints: CSF, ISF concentrations, and amyloid plaque levels

study_design.dosing_regimens: 700 mg ×3 doses followed by 1400 mg Q4W (standard 76-week regimen)

disease_severity: Early symptomatic AD (MCI or mild dementia)

endpoints.primary: Predict target ISF concentrations for amyloid plaque reduction
secondary: Model natural amyloid aggregation life cycle

serum_concentrations.standard_regimen: Model predicts steady-state concentrations following 76-week regimen
serum_concentrations.prediction_accuracy: Median predicted vs observed concentrations with 90% prediction intervals

csf_concentrations.1400mg_q4w: Higher CSF exposure with dose escalation

isf_concentrations.standard_regimen: Rapid reduction in ISF amyloid following donanemab treatment
isf_concentrations.target_levels: Identified ISF concentrations associated with therapeutic effect

natural_progression.isf_ab42: Steep reductions in ISF Aβ42 concentrations near age 65
natural_progression.amyloid_pet: Sharp rise in amyloid PET around age 65, attenuating with increasing age
natural_progression.age_effect: Accelerated amyloid aggregation in later adulthood

donanemab_effect.plaque_response: Rapid reduction in ISF amyloid plaque concentrations
donanemab_effect.treatment_response: Coupled model predicts amyloid plaque reduction dynamics

model_validation.observed_vs_predicted: Good agreement between model predictions and observed concentrations
model_validation.prediction_intervals: 90% prediction intervals include observed participant-level concentrations

comparative_signals.pharmacokinetic_advantage: Predictable CSF/ISF distribution with standard dosing
comparative_signals.amyloid_response: Rapid ISF amyloid reduction following treatment initiation
